en_title: Microsoft Reportedly Considering Canceling Marvel's Blade and Shutting Arkane Down
cn_title: 微软据称考虑取消《漫威刀锋战士》并关闭Arkane
subtitle: 急转直下
opus_summary: 微软据称正考虑取消《Marvel's Blade》并关闭Arkane。该作内部延期至2027年底且超支。Arkane或被出售，多家XBOX工作室面临关闭或分拆。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft is reportedly considering canceling Marvel’s Blade and shutting its developer, Arkane, down.
paragraphs.cn: 据报道，微软正考虑取消《漫威刀锋战士》，并关闭其开发商 Arkane。

paragraphs.en: The Verge said Arkane is one of five studios the Xbox owner is considering closing, after Blade's planned late 2026 release window was delayed internally to late 2027 and it went over budget. Blade, from the team behind Deathloop, was announced in December 2023 with a reveal trailer, but we've seen nothing of it since.
paragraphs.cn: The Verge 报道称，Arkane 是微软正考虑关闭的五家工作室之一，此前《漫威刀锋战士》原定于2026年末的发售窗口已内部推迟到2027年末，且项目预算超支。这款由《死亡循环》团队打造的作品于2023年12月公布了一部揭晓预告片，但此后我们再未看到任何新内容。

paragraphs.en: Arkane may be sold rather than closed, The Verge added, which is in-line with what we've heard Compulsion Games, Double Fine, Ninja Theory, and, more recently, Undead Labs, are going through. This process may take some time, and even if the studios are spun off, they may not avoid layoffs.
paragraphs.cn: The Verge 补充道，Arkane 可能会被出售而非直接关闭，这与我们听闻的 Compulsion Games、Double Fine、Ninja Theory 以及最近的 Undead Labs 的遭遇相符。这一过程可能耗时良久，即便这些工作室得以拆分独立，也可能无法避免裁员。

paragraphs.en: IGN has asked Microsoft for comment about the layoffs reports, but it has yet to respond. IGN has also asked Marvel Games about the status of Blade, but it failed to respond.
paragraphs.cn: IGN 已就裁员报道向微软寻求置评，但对方尚未回应。IGN 也向漫威游戏询问了《漫威刀锋战士》的状况，但同样未获回应。

paragraphs.en: The news of Blade's potential cancelation comes just days after Bethesda Game Studios head Todd Howard was quoted as saying he'd recently seen what the Deathloop team at Arkane Lyon was cooking up and was impressed . "I'm not at liberty to say when [we'll see more]," Howard teased, "but I saw some stuff just yesterday [on May 21] and the folks at Arkane [Studios, the developers] are doing a really, really great job." Fans first began to fear the worst after Blade was a no-show at the 2026 Xbox Games Showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 在《漫威刀锋战士》可能被取消的消息传出前几天，贝塞斯达游戏工作室负责人陶德·霍华德刚被引述称，他最近看到了 Arkane Lyon 《死亡循环》团队正在酝酿的东西，并为之折服。「我不便透露[我们何时能看到更多]，」霍华德卖关子道，「但我昨天[5月21日]刚看到一些内容，Arkane [工作室，开发商] 的伙计们干得真的非常、非常出色。」粉丝们最初是在《漫威刀锋战士》缺席2026年XBOX游戏展示会后，才开始担忧最坏的情况。

paragraphs.en: Blade isn't the only Xbox game under threat of cancelation. after reports overnight suggested both are under threat of closure as part of impending layoffs at Xbox. Psychonauts developer Double Fine, South of Midnight developer Compulsion, and Hellblade developer Ninja Theory are also said to be in talks with Microsoft over potentially buying themselves out. Hundreds of jobs are at risk either way, not just at these studios, but across Microsoft’s gaming business, which includes Bethesda and Activision Blizzard studios and publishing operations.
paragraphs.cn: 面临取消风险的XBOX游戏不止《漫威刀锋战士》。据隔夜报道，两者都面临被取消的威胁，作为XBOX即将到来的裁员计划的一部分。《意航员》开发商Double Fine、《午夜之南》开发商Compulsion，以及《地狱之刃》开发商Ninja Theory，据称也在与微软商谈潜在的自我买断事宜。无论结果如何，都会有数百个岗位面临风险，不仅限于这些工作室，而是遍布微软整个游戏业务，包括贝塞斯达和动视暴雪旗下的各工作室与出版发行部门。

paragraphs.en: State of Decay 3, like Ninja Theory’s Senua, was at Microsoft’s Xbox Games Showcase earlier this month. According to Game File , Microsoft allegedly planned to close or spin off Ninja Theory when it revealed Senua at the showcase event, and it did so thinking that “the promise of a newly announced game would help draw investor interest in the studio.” Game File’s Stephen Totilo suggests Ninja Theory management may not have even been aware of Microsoft’s plan.
paragraphs.cn: 《腐烂国度3》和 Ninja Theory 的《塞娜》一样，也在本月早些时候的微软 XBOX Games Showcase 上亮相。据 Game File 报道，微软据称在展会上公布《塞娜》时，就已计划关闭或剥离 Ninja Theory，并认为「一款新公布游戏的承诺有助于吸引投资者对工作室的兴趣」。Game File 的 Stephen Totilo 暗示，Ninja Theory 管理层当时甚至可能对微软的计划毫不知情。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley 是 IGN 新闻总监。可在 X 上找到他 @wyp100，或通过邮箱 wesley_yinpoole@ign.com 或保密邮箱 wyp100@proton.me 联系。

manual_approved_issues.detail: source contains 'Bethesda', but required dictionary translation 'B社/贝塞斯达' is missing
